data.name: 在校工室與JK共度的日常
data.detailed_description:
✤遊戲內容✤

和亞里沙對話，送她禮物提升好感度，讓她敞開心扉吧。

禮物可以用勞動換來的收入在福利社買到。

遊戲途中，就算選錯選項也不會GAME OVER。

請盡情享受和亞里沙的對話吧。

✤女主角✤

辣妹女高●生。

很中意校工室，經常翹課跑來玩。

在像現代JK一樣把校工當空氣無視的同時，

也隱約散發出一股寂寞的氛圍。

✤其他✤

  • 需要滑鼠才能操作。

  • 以校園為舞台的日常系互動遊戲。

  • 要求的電腦環境以RPG製作大師MV的需求為準。

data.short_description: 回到校工室的我，卻發現JK突然闖進房間裡來……！而我漸漸習慣她的存在，也和她感情也越來越好。
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor

data.name: Life in The Janitor's Room with A JK Girl
data.detailed_description:
✤ Game Overview ✤

Build a friendship with Arisa through conversations and thoughtful gifts.
You can purchase gifts from the school store using the income earned through labor.

Even if you make the wrong choices along the way, the game will not result in a game over.
Enjoy spending time talking with Arisa as much as you like.

✤ Character Introduction ✤

Futaba Arisa
She enjoys spending time in the janitor’s room as a place to relax away from the classroom.

Although she acts indifferent, she carries an air of loneliness, as if something in her life remains unfulfilled.

✤ Other Features ✤

  • A mouse is required for gameplay.

  • A slice-of-life simulation game set in a school environment.

  • System requirements are based on RPG Maker MV.

data.short_description: I returned to the janitor's room and found that a JK had suddenly barged in... As I got used to her presence, our relationship grew closer.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
